task: Migrate download queue screens from FlexibleAdapter/RecyclerView to Jetpack Compose, then remove the flexibleadapter dependency

features.name: Refactor screen models to emit Compose-compatible state

learnings: DEAD_CODE_FOR_FEATURE4: Both ScreenModels still have adapter, controllerBinding, progressJobs, listener object, getHolder(), onUpdateProgress(), onUpdateDownloadedPages(), onStatusChange(), cancelProgressJob(). These ALL reference old FlexibleAdapter types. Remove them all.

FEATURE4_FILES_TO_DELETE: anime/AnimeDownloadAdapter.kt, anime/AnimeDownloadHeaderItem.kt, anime/AnimeDownloadHeaderHolder.kt, anime/AnimeDownloadItem.kt, anime/AnimeDownloadHolder.kt, manga/MangaDownloadAdapter.kt, manga/MangaDownloadHeaderItem.kt, manga/MangaDownloadHeaderHolder.kt, manga/MangaDownloadItem.kt, manga/MangaDownloadHolder.kt
FEATURE4_BUILD_FILES: Remove 'implementation(libs.flexible.adapter.core)' from app/build.gradle.kts and 'flexible-adapter-core = ...' from gradle/libs.versions.toml

FEATURE4_CHECK_IMPORTS: After deleting files, grep both ScreenModels for any remaining import of eu.davidea.flexibleadapter or AnimeDownloadAdapter/AnimeDownloadItem/AnimeDownloadHeaderItem etc. All such imports must be removed.

FEATURE4_VIEWBINDING: app/build.gradle.kts has viewBinding = true. After removing all View-based code, check if viewBinding can be disabled. Only disable if NO other files use generated ViewBinding classes.
